text: DEAL: Lie-Nielsen No.7 jointer plane, lightly used, $395 shipped. Seller @planestand_ross
been chasing a No.7 forever. is the sole flat
checked flat with a straightedge, no rock. dm me
hey saw the No.7 in the channel. is $395 firm or would you do 360
could do 375 shipped, blade's freshly honed
let me think on it, saving up a tools fund and 375 is most of it

already run narex, they take an edge well for the price
DEAL: benchtop router table, cast top, aftermarket fence, $310 local pickup Raleigh area
that's on my list. who's the seller, i'm in raleigh
that's mine, dm me and we can meet up

yep still here. i'm off capital blvd, evenings work
cool. router table before jointer probably, more use day to day
